content:
RORK REMOVAL FINAL CLEANUP — ZERO RORK IN IVX IA fix complete everything in native too 

Current status:
Runtime Rork removal is reported complete, but cleanup remains:
- EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_* env vars still exist in dashboards.
- @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk may still exist in Expo package/dependencies.
- Need final proof that IVX IA has zero Rork runtime, build, env, SDK, and API dependency.

OBJECTIVE:
Remove Rork end-to-end from IVX IA without crashing the app.

EXECUTE NOW:

1. Environment cleanup
- Remove from Render / Expo / project env:
  EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_API_BASE_URL
  EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_AUTH_URL
  EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_FUNCTIONS_URL
  EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY
  EXPO_PUBLIC_TOOLKIT_URL
  RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY
  Any rork_sk_* value

2. Package cleanup
- Remove @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk from package.json / bun.lock / package-lock / yarn.lock.
- Verify package manager install works after removal.

3. Metro cleanup
- Confirm metro.config.js does NOT use withRorkMetro.
- Confirm Expo uses plain getDefaultConfig or IVX-owned config.

4. Runtime scan
Run grep/scan for:
- toolkit.rork.com
- api.rork.com
- rork.com
- rork_sk
- EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK
- RORK_TOOLKIT
- withRorkMetro
- @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk

Allowed only in:
- archived proof files
- old audit logs
- documentation clearly marked non-runtime

Not allowed in:
- backend runtime
- Expo app runtime
- iOS runtime
- Android runtime
- web bundle
- active env files
- deploy config

5. AI provider verification
Verify IVX IA uses only:
- IVX AI Gateway / Vercel AI Gateway
- OpenAI direct fallback
- Anthropic direct fallback

Verify:
- Owner AI responds
- Public AI responds
- Senior Developer responds
- No call goes to Rork.

6. Builds
Run:
- backend tests
- typecheck
- Expo Android build/check
- iOS build/check
- Web build
- secret scan

7. Deploy
- Push final cleanup to GitHub main.
- Trigger Render deploy.
- Verify production.

8. Final production checks
Verify:
- /health = 200
- /version = final GitHub SHA
- /api/public/chat = 200
- /api/ivx/owner-ai = 200 with owner auth
- /api/ivx/senior-developer/status = auth-gated, registered
- Android app opens
- iOS app opens
- Web app opens

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
RORK_ENV_REMOVED:
RORK_PACKAGE_REMOVED:
METRO_STATUS:
RUNTIME_SCAN_STATUS:
AI_PROVIDER_CHAIN:
OWNER_AI_STATUS:
PUBLIC_AI_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
WEB_STATUS:
TYPECHECK_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
SECRET_SCAN_STATUS:
FILES_CHANGED:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only if:
- zero active runtime Rork references
- zero active build dependency on Rork
- zero active env dependency on Rork
- IVX IA answers using IVX/OpenAI/Anthropic provider chain
- Android, iOS, Web, backend all pass
- production deploy verified

If any Rork dependency remains active, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED.
